errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Morning journal prompt failed to run — rate limit hit at 6AM during the burst of morning cron jobs.
errors.suggestedFix: Stagger morning cron schedules by at least 10–15 minutes to avoid simultaneous Anthropic API calls.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Daily Obsidian planning note was not written — rate limit hit 5 minutes after journal-prompt.
errors.suggestedFix: Move daily-obsidian-note to 6:20 CDT to clear the 6AM rate limit burst window.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Objectives and open-loops JSON not refreshed today — dashboard data is stale.
errors.suggestedFix: Offset this job to 7:20 CDT and ensure infra-version-check runs at 7:00 CDT instead (lighter job).

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Version update check has failed 3 consecutive times — infrastructure drift may be going undetected.
errors.suggestedFix: Switch this job model to 'haiku' (lighter, fewer tokens) and offset schedule to 7:05 CDT.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: PayPal acquisition probability estimate not updated — research-tasks.json is stale.
errors.suggestedFix: Move to 8:30 CDT or later to run after the morning burst window clears.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Monday tweet draft generation failed — no new @quiet_drift drafts in #obj-95 today.
errors.suggestedFix: Move to 9:00 CDT to avoid the 8AM rate limit collision with infrastructure-daily-scan.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Daily infrastructure intel post to #infrastructure did not run — ecosystem changes may be missed.
errors.suggestedFix: Offset to 8:15 CDT; also consider using Codex (OpenAI) instead of Sonnet to offload Anthropic quota.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Saturday stablecoin research drop to #obj-106 failed — PYUSD/Arbitrum signals not surfaced.
errors.suggestedFix: Reschedule to a non-peak time (e.g., 10:00 CDT) or switch model to Codex to avoid Anthropic rate limits.

errors.error: ⚠️ API rate limit reached. Please try again later.
errors.meaning: Tomorrow's calendar was not gap-filled — the 5PM daily schedule automation has failed 3 consecutive days.
errors.suggestedFix: Switch model to 'haiku' for this job; it only needs calendar reads/writes, not heavy reasoning.

errors.meaning: Weekly Toggl time summary failed to post — delivery config uses short channel ID without 'channel:' prefix.
errors.suggestedFix: Update job delivery.to from 'C0AMWT9JB5Y' to 'channel:C0AMWT9JB5Y' to match required format.
